Some had him living out his days in the African jungle with a gang of loyal followers, with Hitler passing on his leadership of Germany to Hermann Göring. There were even reports that Hitler had survived the war and been hiding in the Antarctic, along with some supposed sightings of Hitler in various parts of the world. In reality, Hitler had probably not survived the assassination attempt on his life, though it is possible that Hitler had attempted to avoid being captured by American troops, and was in hiding in Berlin with a small group of loyalists.”
